message:
chore(beads): sync issue store after local status/metadata touches

Routine `br sync --flush-only` export. 63 lines in .beads/issues.jsonl
shifted — all are same-ID updates (no additions/removals at the bead
level), almost entirely driven by updated_at / metadata bumps on the
br-8qdh0 and br-8ujfs epic children after their recent re-close +
assignee touches. Diff shape: same bead count, same IDs, just newer
status/updated_at/closed_at payloads coming out of the local DB.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
